description: Add two independent control-plane-to-runner messages without losing either update when both stories modify the ToRunner union concurrently.

userStories.title: Add numeric whole-run dispatch message
userStories.description: In src/protocol.ts add and export RunDispatchMsg with exactly these fields: t: 'dispatch_run', runId: string, goal: string, workspaceId: string, parallel: number, timeoutSecs: number, and optional route?: DispatchRoute. Add it to ToRunner while preserving every existing union member. Do not implement any other message type.
acceptance: RunDispatchMsg uses parallel: number and the exact requested field types
ToRunner accepts RunDispatchMsg without losing existing variants

userStories.title: Add runner rejection message
userStories.description: In src/protocol.ts add and export RejectMsg with exactly t: 'rejected' and reason: string. Add it to ToRunner while preserving every existing union member, including concurrent story updates. Do not implement whole-run dispatch yourself.
acceptance: RejectMsg has exactly t: 'rejected' and reason: string
ToRunner accepts RejectMsg without losing existing or concurrent variants
